title: Audit: Identify high-value Pinake follow-up tasks
description:
Autonomous audit task generated by AI agent.

Scope:
- Review the current Lynvo board to avoid duplicate tasks.
- Inspect repository structure, extension activation, commands, services, templates, schemas, tests, and docs.
- Run available validation/test checks where feasible.
- Create detailed Lynvo tasks for concrete bugs and high-value features discovered during the audit.

checklist.text: Review existing Lynvo tasks and board metadata
Inspect project architecture and implementation hotspots
Run available checks and review failures
Select non-duplicate bugs and high-value features
Create detailed Lynvo tasks with action plans and code references
